portfolio_rationale: XOM leads with the only genuinely bullish technical picture (price above all key MAs, positive momentum across timeframes) combined with a bullish judge signal, making it the highest-conviction holding. AAPL and AMZN both carry strong fundamentals and bullish judge signals at 0.85 confidence, with AAPL's oversold RSI suggesting near-term rebound potential. BRK.B and LLY are excluded due to bearish judge signals.

XOM.reason: Strongest technical confirmation with price above all key MAs and positive momentum on both 5d and 20d timeframes, backed by consistent bullish judge signals over three weeks.

AAPL.reason: Exceptional fundamentals (15.6% revenue growth, 48% gross margin, $52B OCF) with RSI at 30 signaling oversold rebound potential, and the bear case rests primarily on minor liquidity concerns.

AMZN.reason: Strong fundamental profile (15.7% revenue growth, 44% gross margin, solid ROE/ROA) with MACD above signal line and positive 20d return momentum supporting the bullish thesis.

GOOGL.reason: Strong ROE/ROA and excellent liquidity with a bullish judge signal, but missing revenue/margin data and recurring litigation risk flags reduce conviction relative to peers.

BRK.B.reason: Bearish judge signal with negative revenue growth, thin operating margin, and multiple bearish technical indicators.

LLY.reason: Bearish judge signal at 0.85 confidence driven by strongly bearish technicals (TechnicalAnalyst 0.9 confidence bearish) and negative news sentiment despite strong fundamentals.
